'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=r7558_LTwMG8C9XsqtqA2_cxAWa3H.enNyEKLY7CpA0-1774027390-1.0.1.1-iGB_RmKo_JihvqO9DkEzhK6N2UUal4PdNd_T0u1ALd0"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
